'''dodhataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:epappose|epappose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:epappose|epappose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dodhataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhatithi|dodhatithi]] || [[word:dodhatiji|dodhatiji]] || [[word:dodhatishi|dodhatishi]] || [[word:dodhatiki|dodhatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhatuthuthu|dodhatuthuthu]] || [[word:dodhatujuju|dodhatujuju]] || [[word:dodhatushushu|dodhatushushu]] || [[word:dodhatukuku|dodhatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhatuthu|dodhatuthu]] || [[word:dodhatuju|dodhatuju]] || [[word:dodhatushu|dodhatushu]] || [[word:dodhatuku|dodhatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhatufthuf|dodhatufthuf]] || [[word:dodhatufjuf|dodhatufjuf]] || [[word:dodhatufshuf|dodhatufshuf]] || [[word:dodhatufkuf|dodhatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhatethe|dodhatethe]] || [[word:dodhateje|dodhateje]] || [[word:dodhateshe|dodhateshe]] || [[word:dodhateke|dodhateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhatothotho|dodhatothotho]] || [[word:dodhatojojo|dodhatojojo]] || [[word:dodhatoshosho|dodhatoshosho]] || [[word:dodhatokoko|dodhatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhatotho|dodhatotho]] || [[word:dodhatojo|dodhatojo]] || [[word:dodhatosho|dodhatosho]] || [[word:dodhatoko|dodhatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhatofthof|dodhatofthof]] || [[word:dodhatofjof|dodhatofjof]] || [[word:dodhatofshof|dodhatofshof]] || [[word:dodhatofkof|dodhatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhatïfthïf|dodhatïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfjïf|dodhatïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfshïf|dodhatïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfkïf|dodhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhatïfthïfthïf|dodhatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfjïfjïf|dodhatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfshïfshïf|dodhatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfkïfkïf|dodhatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhatïfthïf|dodhatïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfjïf|dodhatïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfshïf|dodhatïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfkïf|dodhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhatïfthïf|dodhatïfthïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfjïf|dodhatïfjïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfshïf|dodhatïfshïf]] || [[word:dodhatïfkïf|dodhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodhatæthæ|dodhatæthæ]] || [[word:dodhatæjæ|dodhatæjæ]] || [[word:dodhatæshæ|dodhatæshæ]] || [[word:dodhatækæ|dodhatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodhatathatha|dodhatathatha]] || [[word:dodhatajaja|dodhatajaja]] || [[word:dodhatashasha|dodhatashasha]] || [[word:dodhatakaka|dodhatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodhatatha|dodhatatha]] || [[word:dodhataja|dodhataja]] || [[word:dodhatasha|dodhatasha]] || [[word:dodhataka|dodhataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodhatafthaf|dodhatafthaf]] || [[word:dodhatafjaf|dodhatafjaf]] || [[word:dodhatafshaf|dodhatafshaf]] || [[word:dodhatafkaf|dodhatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dodhatasha|dodhatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhatshësha|dodhatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhatrosha|dodhatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhatmusha|dodhatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhatyasha|dodhatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhatnkshësha|gododhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhatnkrosha|gododhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhatnkmusha|gododhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhatnkyasha|gododhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dodhadhatasha|dodhadhatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhadhatshësha|dodhadhatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhadhatrosha|dodhadhatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhadhatmusha|dodhadhatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhadhatyasha|dodhadhatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhadhatnkshësha|gododhadhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhadhatnkrosha|gododhadhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhadhatnkmusha|gododhadhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhadhatnkyasha|gododhadhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dedhætasha|dedhætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dedhætshësha|dedhætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dedhætrosha|dedhætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dedhætmusha|dedhætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dedhætyasha|dedhætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godedhætnkshësha|godedhætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godedhætnkrosha|godedhætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godedhætnkmusha|godedhætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godedhætnkyasha|godedhætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dodhfatasha|dodhfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhfatshësha|dodhfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhfatrosha|dodhfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhfatmusha|dodhfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhfatyasha|dodhfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhfatnkshësha|gododhfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhfatnkrosha|gododhfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhfatnkmusha|gododhfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhfatnkyasha|gododhfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
